subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] fs/pipe: pre-allocate pages outside pipe->mutex in anon_pipe_write

reviews.author: Breno Leitao
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that alloc_pages_bulk() does not support memcg accounting, which is requested by the patch, and pointed out a specific line in the bulk allocator function where this limitation is enforced.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch modifies the anon_pipe_write function to pre-allocate pages outside of the pipe->mutex lock, using alloc_pages_bulk() for efficiency when allocating multiple pages at once.
